targets.query:
from(bucket: "dekapu-log")
  |> range(start: -1d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mpp-savedata")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "credit_all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.user == "${user}")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "dekapu-log")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mpp-savedata")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "credit_all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.user == "${user}")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: true)
  |> fill(column: "_value", usePrevious: true)

from(bucket: "dekapu-log")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mpp-savedata")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "buy_total")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.user == "${user}")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: true)
  |> fill(column: "_value", usePrevious: true)

import "timezone"
option location = timezone.location(name: "Asia/Tokyo")

from(bucket: "dekapu-log")
  |> range(start: -2d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mpp-savedata")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "credit_all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.user == "${user}")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, offset: -5h, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> difference(nonNegative: true)
  |> last()

from(bucket: "dekapu-log")
  |> range(start: -1d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "mpp-savedata")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "credit")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["user"] == "${user}")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "dekapu-log")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mpp-savedata")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "credit_all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.user == "${user}")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: last, createEmpty: true, timeSrc: "_start")
  |> difference(nonNegative: true)
  |> fill(column: "_value", value: 0)

targets.query:
from(bucket: "dekapu-log")
  |> range(start: -1d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mpp-savedata")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "rmshbi_get")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.user == "${user}")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "dekapu-log")
  |> range(start: -1d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mpp-savedata")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "task_cnt" or r._field == "bbox_all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.user == "${user}")
  |> last()
  |> pivot(
      rowKey:["_time"],
      columnKey:["_field"],
      valueColumn:"_value"
    )
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: r._time,
      _value: if exists r.task_cnt and r.task_cnt != 0.0 
              then float(v: r.bbox_all) / float(v: r.task_cnt) 
              else 0.0
    }))

from(bucket: "dekapu-log")

  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.user == "${user}")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: max, createEmpty: false)
  |> fill(column: "_value", value: 0)

jacksp = from(bucket: "dekapu-log")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mpp-savedata")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "jacksp_get_all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.user == "${user}")
  |> last()
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "jacksp_value"})

pallot = from(bucket: "dekapu-log")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mpp-savedata")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "pallot_lot_t0")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.user == "${user}")
  |> last()
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "pallot_value"})

join(tables: {jacksp: jacksp, pallot: pallot}, on: ["user"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: r._time,
      _value: if exists r.pallot_value and r.pallot_value != 0.0
              then float(v: r.jacksp_value) / float(v: r.pallot_value)
              else 0.0,
  }))

panels.description:
If this has a value, it means you are acquiring paletta balls faster than the roulette wheel pays out.

This is not the internal stock value, just that you have additional balls stored. If the value is above 1, it may be that you rejoined while there were paletta balls in the internal stock.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "dekapu-log")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mpp-savedata")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.user == "${user}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "palball_get" or r._field == "pallot_lot_t0")
  |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey:["_field"], valueColumn:"_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      r with
      _value: r.palball_get - r.pallot_lot_t0
  }))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: max, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "difference")

panels.title: Paletta Ball Internal Stock

              else 0.0

      _time: r._time,
      _measurement: "Single",

    }))

  |> range(start: -1d)

    }))

from(bucket: "dekapu-log")
  |> range(start: -1d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mpp-savedata")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "jacksp_get_t4" or r._field == "pallot_lot_t0")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.user == "${user}")
  |> last()
  |> pivot(
      rowKey:["_time"],
      columnKey:["_field"],
      valueColumn:"_value"
    )
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: r._time,
      _measurement: "Galaxy",
      _value: if exists r.pallot_lot_t0 and r.pallot_lot_t0 != 0.0 then float(v: r.jacksp_get_t4) / float(v: r.pallot_lot_t0) else 0.0
    }))

jacksp = from(bucket: "dekapu-log")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mpp-savedata" and r._field == "jacksp_get_all" and r.user == "${user}")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: last, createEmpty: true, timeSrc: "_start")
  |> difference(nonNegative: true)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "PJP獲得数"}))

pallot = from(bucket: "dekapu-log")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mpp-savedata" and r._field == "pallot_lot_t0" and r.user == "${user}")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: last, createEmpty: true, timeSrc: "_start")
  |> difference(nonNegative: true)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "ボール獲得数"}))

ratio = join(
    tables: {jacksp: jacksp, pallot: pallot},
    on: ["_time"]
  )
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: r._time,
      _field: "PJP当選率",
      _value: if exists r._value_pallot and r._value_pallot != 0.0
              then float(v: r._value_jacksp) / float(v: r._value_pallot)
              else 0.0
  }))

union(tables: [jacksp, pallot, ratio])
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_field", "_value"])
  |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> yield(name: "PJP当選率")

panels.description: Smaller numbers make it easier to keep an ultimate up. If it's close to 1, consider pale pink totem.

targets.query:
sqr = from(bucket: "dekapu-log")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mpp-savedata")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "sqr_step")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.user == "${user}")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: last, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
  |> difference(nonNegative: true)
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "sqr_step"})

jack = from(bucket: "dekapu-log")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mpp-savedata")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "jack_get")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.user == "${user}")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: last, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
  |> difference(nonNegative: true)
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "jack_get"})

join(tables: {sqr: sqr, jack: jack}, on: ["_time"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: r._time,
      _value: if r.jack_get > 0.0 
              then float(v: r.sqr_step) / (float(v: r.jack_get) * 16.0) 
              else 0.0
    }))

from(bucket: "dekapu-log")
  |> range(start: -1d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mpp-savedata")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field =~ /^l_totems_set_/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.user == "${user}")
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      r with
      _field:
        if r._field == "l_totems_set_1" then "Altar 1"
        else if r._field == "l_totems_set_2" then "Altar 2"
        else if r._field == "l_totems_set_3" then "Altar 3"
        else if r._field == "l_totems_set_4" then "Altar 4"
        else if r._field == "l_totems_set_5" then "Altar 5"
        else r._field,
      _value:
        if r._value == 0 then "N/A"
        else if r._value == 1 then "Orange"
        else if r._value == 2 then "Green"
        else if r._value == 4 then "Pink"
        else if r._value == 5 then "Purple"
        else if r._value == 6 then "White"
        else if r._value == 7 then "Cyan"
        else if r._value == 8 then "Pale Red"
        else if r._value == 9 then "Navy"
        else if r._value == 10 then "Red"
        else if r._value == 11 then "Cream"
        else if r._value == 12 then "Mint"
        else if r._value == 13 then "Peach"
        else if r._value == 14 then "Starry"
        else if r._value == 15 then "Meadow"
        else if r._value == 16 then "Black"
        else if r._value == 17 then "Yellow"
        else if r._value == 18 then "Lavender"
        else if r._value == 19 then "Lime"
        else string(v: r._value)
  }))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_field", "_value"])
  |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> drop(columns: ["_time"])

import "strings"

from(bucket: "dekapu-log")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mpp-savedata")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field =~ /^dc_ball_get_/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.user == "${user}")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: last, createEmpty: true, timeSrc: "_start")
  |> difference(nonNegative: true)
  |> fill(column: "_value", value: 0)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
        r with
        _field:
          if r._field == "dc_ball_get_0" then "Normal"
          else if r._field == "dc_ball_get_1" then "Orange"
          else if r._field == "dc_ball_get_2" then "Green"
          else if r._field == "dc_ball_get_3" then "Rainbow"
          else if r._field == "dc_ball_get_4" then "Pink"
          else if r._field == "dc_ball_get_5" then "Purple"
          else if r._field == "dc_ball_get_6" then "White"
          else if r._field == "dc_ball_get_7" then "Cyan"
          else if r._field == "dc_ball_get_8" then "Pale Pink"
          else if r._field == "dc_ball_get_9" then "Navy"
          else if r._field == "dc_ball_get_10" then "Red"
          else if r._field == "dc_ball_get_11" then "Cream"
          else if r._field == "dc_ball_get_12" then "Mint"
          else if r._field == "dc_ball_get_13" then "Peach"
          else if r._field == "dc_ball_get_14" then "Starry"
          else if r._field == "dc_ball_get_15" then "Meadow"
          else if r._field == "dc_ball_get_16" then "Black"
          else if r._field == "dc_ball_get_17" then "Yellow"
          else if r._field == "dc_ball_get_18" then "Lavender"
          else if r._field == "dc_ball_get_19" then "Lime"
          else if r._field == "dc_ball_get_90" then "Dead Sherbi (??)"
          else if r._field == "dc_ball_get_91" then "Unknown Currency"
          else if r._field == "dc_ball_get_100" then "Golden"
          else if r._field == "dc_ball_get_101" then "Amethyst"
          else if r._field == "dc_ball_get_102" then "Emerald"
          else if r._field == "dc_ball_get_103" then "Rose Quartz"
          else if r._field == "dc_ball_get_104" then "Topaz"
          else if r._field == "dc_ball_get_105" then "Sapphire"
          else if r._field == "dc_ball_get_334" then "Lottery"
          else if r._field == "dc_ball_get_335" then "Lottery (Special)"
          else strings.replace(v: r._field, t: "dc_ball_get_", u: "ID:", i: 1)
      }))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_field", "_value"])

  |> group(columns: ["_time"])
  |> sum(column: "_value")
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "total"})

join(
  tables: {d: data, t: totals},
  on: ["_time"]
)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: r._time,
      _field: r._field,
      _value: float(v: r._value) / float(v: r.total) * 100.0
  }))
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])

        _field:
          if r._field == "dc_ball_chain_0" then "Normal"
          else if r._field == "dc_ball_chain_1" then "Orange"
          else if r._field == "dc_ball_chain_2" then "Green"
          else if r._field == "dc_ball_chain_3" then "Rainbow"
          else if r._field == "dc_ball_chain_4" then "Pink"
          else if r._field == "dc_ball_chain_5" then "Purple"
          else if r._field == "dc_ball_chain_6" then "White"
          else if r._field == "dc_ball_chain_7" then "Cyan"
          else if r._field == "dc_ball_chain_8" then "Pale Pink"
          else if r._field == "dc_ball_chain_9" then "Navy"
          else if r._field == "dc_ball_chain_10" then "Red"
          else if r._field == "dc_ball_chain_11" then "Cream"
          else if r._field == "dc_ball_chain_12" then "Mint"
          else if r._field == "dc_ball_chain_13" then "Peach"
          else if r._field == "dc_ball_chain_14" then "Starry"
          else if r._field == "dc_ball_chain_15" then "Meadow"
          else if r._field == "dc_ball_chain_16" then "Black"
          else if r._field == "dc_ball_chain_17" then "Yellow"
          else if r._field == "dc_ball_chain_18" then "Lavender"
          else if r._field == "dc_ball_chain_19" then "Lime"
          else if r._field == "dc_ball_chain_90" then "Dead Sherbi (??)"
          else if r._field == "dc_ball_chain_100" then "Golden"
          else if r._field == "dc_ball_chain_101" then "Amethyst"
          else if r._field == "dc_ball_chain_102" then "Emerald"
          else if r._field == "dc_ball_chain_103" then "Rose Quartz"
          else if r._field == "dc_ball_chain_104" then "Topaz"
          else if r._field == "dc_ball_chain_105" then "Sapphire"
          else if r._field == "dc_ball_chain_334" then "Lottery"
          else if r._field == "dc_ball_chain_335" then "Lottery (Special)"
          else strings.replace(v: r._field, t: "dc_ball_chain_", u: "ID:", i: 1)
      }))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_field", "_value"])
  |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> drop(columns: ["_time"])

targets.query:
from(bucket: "dekapu-log")
  |> range(start: -1d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mpp-savedata")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "medal_get")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.user == "${user}")
  |> last()

import "strings"

from(bucket: "dekapu-log")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mpp-savedata")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field =~ /^dc_medal_get_/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.user == "${user}")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: last, createEmpty: true, timeSrc: "_start")
  |> difference(nonNegative: true)
  |> fill(column: "_value", value: 0)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
        r with
        _field:
        if r._field == "dc_medal_get_0" then "Normal"
        else if r._field == "dc_medal_get_1" then "Orange (Roulette)"
        else if r._field == "dc_medal_get_2" then "Green"
        else if r._field == "dc_medal_get_3" then "Pink"
        else if r._field == "dc_medal_get_4" then "Purple"
        else if r._field == "dc_medal_get_5" then "Cyan"
        else if r._field == "dc_medal_get_6" then "Wall Medal"
        else if r._field == "dc_medal_get_7" then "SP Medal"
        else if r._field == "dc_medal_get_12" then "Green x10"
        else if r._field == "dc_medal_get_13" then "Pink x10"
        else if r._field == "dc_medal_get_14" then "Purple x10"
        else if r._field == "dc_medal_get_15" then "Gold"
        else if r._field == "dc_medal_get_16" then "Gold Bar"
        else if r._field == "dc_medal_get_17" then "Gold Bar x10"
        else if r._field == "dc_medal_get_18" then "Large Gold"
        else if r._field == "dc_medal_get_19" then "Large Gold x10"
        else if r._field == "dc_medal_get_20" then "Large Gold x100"
        else if r._field == "dc_medal_get_21" then "Unknown Currency"
        else if r._field == "dc_medal_get_100" then "Rainbow"
        else if r._field == "dc_medal_get_101" then "Gold (Bot Frame)"
        else if r._field == "dc_medal_get_102" then "Sapphire"
        else if r._field == "dc_medal_get_103" then "Ruby"
        else if r._field == "dc_medal_get_104" then "Emerald"
        else if r._field == "dc_medal_get_105" then "Diamond"
        else strings.replace(v: r._field, t: "dc_medal_get_", u: "ID:", i: 1)
      }))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_field", "_value"])

import "strings"

data = from(bucket: "dekapu-log")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mpp-savedata")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field =~ /^dc_medal_get_/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.user == "${user}")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: last, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
  |> difference(nonNegative: true)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      r with
      _field:
        if r._field == "dc_medal_get_0" then "Normal"
        else if r._field == "dc_medal_get_1" then "Orange (Roulette)"
        else if r._field == "dc_medal_get_2" then "Green"
        else if r._field == "dc_medal_get_3" then "Pink"
        else if r._field == "dc_medal_get_4" then "Purple"
        else if r._field == "dc_medal_get_5" then "Cyan"
        else if r._field == "dc_medal_get_6" then "Wall Medal"
        else if r._field == "dc_medal_get_7" then "SP Medal"
        else if r._field == "dc_medal_get_12" then "Green x10"
        else if r._field == "dc_medal_get_13" then "Red x10"
        else if r._field == "dc_medal_get_14" then "Purple x10"
        else if r._field == "dc_medal_get_15" then "Gold"
        else if r._field == "dc_medal_get_16" then "Gold Bar"
        else if r._field == "dc_medal_get_17" then "Gold Bar x10"
        else if r._field == "dc_medal_get_18" then "Large Gold"
        else if r._field == "dc_medal_get_19" then "Large Gold x10"
        else if r._field == "dc_medal_get_20" then "Large Gold x100"
        else if r._field == "dc_medal_get_21" then "Unknown Currency"
        else if r._field == "dc_medal_get_100" then "Rainbow"
        else if r._field == "dc_medal_get_101" then "Gold (Bot Frame)"
        else if r._field == "dc_medal_get_102" then "Sapphire"
        else if r._field == "dc_medal_get_103" then "Ruby"
        else if r._field == "dc_medal_get_104" then "Emerald"
        else if r._field == "dc_medal_get_105" then "Diamond"
        else strings.replace(v: r._field, t: "dc_medal_get_", u: "ID:", i: 1)
  }))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_field", "_value"])

totals = data
  |> group(columns: ["_time"])
  |> sum(column: "_value")
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "total"})

join(
  tables: {d: data, t: totals},
  on: ["_time"]
)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: r._time,
      _field: r._field,
      _value: float(v: r._value) / float(v: r.total) * 100.0
  }))
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])

from(bucket: "dekapu-log")
  |> range(start: -1d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mpp-savedata")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "medal_in")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.user == "${user}")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "dekapu-log")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mpp-savedata")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "medal_in")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.user == "${user}")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: last, createEmpty: true, timeSrc: "_start")
  |> difference(nonNegative: true)
  |> fill(column: "_value", value: 0)

from(bucket: "dekapu-log")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mpp-savedata")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "medal_in")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.user == "${user}")
  |> derivative(unit: 1s, nonNegative: true)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mpp-savedata")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "dc_medal_get_7")
